basic_details.job_title: JPCH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital (JPCH) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the JPCH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidate as per rule

qualification.details: Medicine, Surgery, Radiology, Obs & Gynae, Paeds., Anaesthesia: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned speciality from a recognized University / Institution and should have a valid registration with Delhi Medical Council. Must have not completed 03 years Senior Residency in any recognized institution including regular & adhoc period.

salary_details.details: Rs.67700 – 208700 of level 11plus allowances as admissible under the rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JPCH Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 26 May 2026 and will continue every Wednesday until all vacancies are filled. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise details.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Senior Resident posts at JPCH?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma/DNB in the relevant specialty from a recognized institution and hold a valid registration with the Delhi Medical Council. They should not have completed 3 years of Senior Residency.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Resident posts at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month, along with allowances as admissible under the rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Senior Residents at JPCH?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts across various specialities, including Medicine, Surgery, Radiology, Obs & Gynae, Paeds., and Anaesthesia.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the JPCH Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Senior Resident posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for JPCH Senior Resident posts to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital, Delhi - 110053.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a regular or ad-hoc appointment?
faq.answer: The Senior Resident posts are on an ad-hoc basis.
